title: Rebrand to zakariasadeq7site123, update games to unblocked style, and update shows with Breaking Bad + popular TV

requirements.text: Rebrand the entire site to 'zakariasadeq7site123'. Update the site name in the Navigation logo, HeroSection headline/logo, Footer, and the HTML title tag in index.html so that 'zakariasadeq7site123' appears consistently everywhere 'NexHub' currently appears.

quotes: add the name to be zakariasadeq7site123

acceptanceCriteria: The HeroSection displays 'zakariasadeq7site123' as the site name
The Footer displays 'zakariasadeq7site123' as the site logo/name
No instance of the old name 'NexHub' remains visible in the UI

requirements.text: Update the Games section to feature unblocked/proxy-style games inspired by Hypcal and Totally Science. Replace the current game list with at least 6 popular unblocked games such as Slope, 1v1.LOL, Cookie Clicker, Run 3, Drift Hunters, and Retro Bowl, using their publicly accessible embed or iframe URLs. Update the backend hardcoded games array to reflect these new entries (title, description, embed URL, thumbnail URL).

quotes: yes u did good just do those 3 steps

acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 unblocked/proxy-style games are displayed in the Games section grid
Each game card shows a title, thumbnail (or emoji fallback), and a Play Now button
Clicking Play Now opens the game in the GamePlayer modal iframe
Games are inspired by the Hypcal/Totally Science catalog (Slope, Run 3, Cookie Clicker, etc.)
Backend games array is updated with the new game entries

requirements.text: Update the Shows section to include Breaking Bad and at least 5 other popular TV shows (e.g., The Office, Game of Thrones, Stranger Things, Breaking Bad, The Wire, Peaky Blinders, The Sopranos). Each show card should display a title, cover image or emoji fallback, a short description, and a Watch Now button that loads an official YouTube trailer or highlight embed in the VideoPlayer modal. Update the backend hardcoded shows array to reflect these new entries.

quotes: add breaking bad and many other popular TV shows please

acceptanceCriteria: Breaking Bad appears as a show entry in the Shows section
At least 6 popular TV shows are displayed in the Shows section grid
Each show card shows a title, cover image or emoji fallback, description, and Watch Now button
Clicking Watch Now opens a YouTube embed for that show's trailer in the VideoPlayer modal
Backend shows array is updated with the new show entries including YouTube embed URLs

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve the existing dark neon theme, card-based layout, and overall visual design
Game and show embed URLs must be publicly accessible and suitable for iframe embedding
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme or color scheme
Adding new sections beyond Proxy, Games, and Shows
Adding a backend search or dynamic content system
